title: calosciadium latifolium
intro: Calosciadium latifolium, also known as the broad-leaved calosciadium, is a plant species that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calosciadium latifolium include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal medicine, the plant is prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
